name: Ch01 日常生活 單元1-2

entries.sentence: At the café, I got a cup of coffee, and a doughnut with chocolate frosting and sprinkles on it.
entries.translation: 在這家咖啡店，我拿了一杯咖啡和有灑巧克力糖霜和碎片的甜甜圈。

entries.sentence: We decided to get some fried dumplings for dinner. Mine were stuffed with cabbage, while my sister's were stuffed with pork.
entries.translation: 我們決定晚餐吃煎餃。我的是包高麗菜的，而我姐姐的是包豬肉的。

entries.sentence: The sunset dyed the sky red.
entries.translation: 夕陽染紅了天空。

entries.sentence: Rose used some blue dye to change the color of her T-shirts.
entries.translation: 蘿絲用了一些藍色染料把自己的T恤染成藍色。

entries.sentence: We got into the elevator and pressed the button to go to the 23rd floor, hoping the ride up wouldn't take long.
entries.translation: 我們進到電梯內並按按鈕到23樓，希望上去的時間不會太久。

entries.sentence: A passport is essential when we travel abroad.
entries.translation: 我們出國旅遊時，護照是不可或缺的。

entries.sentence: Food, shelter, and clothing are essentials for living.
entries.translation: 食物、居所和衣物是生活的基本需要。

wordPlus.note: 1. essential 的常見搭配用法如下：it is essential + to V …至關重要；it is essential (that) + S (+ should) + 原V …至關重要。2. essential 的常見衍生字：essence n. 本質；精油，in essence 本質上；實質上 (= essentially)。

items.sentence: If you want to go to a good college, it's essential to study hard every day.

items.word: it is essential (that) + S (+ should) + 原V
items.sentence: It is essential that everyone wear safety equipment during this dangerous activity.
Though the professor's speech covered many topics, it was in essence/essentially about global warming.

entries.sentence: What is the bus fare from Taichung to Kaohsiung?
entries.translation: 從臺中到高雄的客運票價是多少？

entries.sentence: The rancher put a high fence around his land so no wild animals could come in and attack his cows.
entries.translation: 這位牧場主在他的土地上放上高柵欄，這樣就沒有野生動物可以進入攻擊他的乳牛群。

phrases.sentence: I've gotten acceptance letters from both my top schools, so I'm sitting on the fence about which one I should attend.
phrases.translation: 我從我兩間最想讀的學校都有獲得錄取函，因此猶豫不定，不知該選擇哪間學校。

entries.sentence: They waited for the ferry to return so they could cross the river.
entries.translation: 他們等候渡船返回，以便渡過這條河。

entries.sentence: Greg knew that someone had been in the house because the coals in the fireplace were still glowing.
entries.translation: 葛瑞格知道剛才有人在屋子裡，因為壁爐裡的煤塊還是熱的。

entries.sentence: Which flavor of ice cream do you want: chocolate or vanilla?
entries.translation: 你想吃哪種口味的冰淇淋，巧克力或是香草？

entries.sentence: Kate flavored the fish with sugar and vinegar.
entries.translation: 凱特用糖和醋給魚調味。

entries.sentence: Leo prefers healthy types of bread that are made with whole-wheat flour and other grains as their main ingredient.
entries.translation: 里歐較喜愛由全麥麵粉和其他穀物為主要材料所製成的健康麵包。

entries.sentence: Grace has a large turkey in the freezer, which she plans to cook for Thanksgiving dinner next month.
entries.translation: 葛蕾斯的冷凍櫃裡有隻很大的火雞，這是她計劃下個月感恩節晚餐要煮的。

entries.sentence: Martin's new house is furnished in the Victorian style.
entries.translation: 馬丁的新家布置成維多利亞風格。

entries.sentence: Norman wants to go fishing but doesn't have any gear besides fishing boots.
entries.translation: 諾曼想去釣魚，但除了釣魚用的橡膠鞋外沒有其他裝備。

entries.sentence: My sister wore a white gown to the formal party.
entries.translation: 我姊姊穿了一件白色禮服去參加那場正式的宴會。

entries.sentence: Danny went shopping for his weekly groceries but forgot to buy milk and bread.
entries.translation: 丹尼去買他每週要買的食品雜貨，但忘了買牛奶和麵包。

entries.sentence: Danny stopped at the grocery on his way home and got some milk and bread.
entries.translation: 丹尼在回家途中，順便到雜貨店買些牛奶和麵包。

entries.sentence: It will feel much warmer inside the car if you turn on the heater.
entries.translation: 如果你打開暖氣的話，車內會更暖和。

entries.sentence: Some skiers use helicopters to get to remote mountain slopes.
entries.translation: 有些滑雪客會搭直升機至偏遠的山坡滑雪。

entries.sentence: The charitable organization is collecting money for low-income households.
entries.translation: 那個慈善團體正在為低收入戶募款。

entries.sentence: Household expenses, such as water and electricity, tend to be higher in summer.
entries.translation: 夏天時，像水費及電費等家庭開支會較高。

wordPlus.note: household 的常見搭配字詞如下：

entries.sentence: Lydia's husband told her that he would share the housework.
entries.translation: 莉迪亞的先生說他會分擔家務。

entries.sentence: The poor old man lived in a little wooden hut.
entries.translation: 那位可憐的老人住在一間簡陋的小木屋裡。

entries.sentence: During the past ten years, many foreigners have immigrated to my country.
entries.translation: 過去十年來，有許多外國人移民到我國。

entries.sentence: After 911, the US government started to control immigration carefully.
entries.translation: 在911恐怖攻擊事件之後，美國政府開始小心管控移民移入。

entries.sentence: The man jumped into his jeep and quickly drove up the hill.
entries.translation: 那位男人跳進他的吉普車，迅速駛上山坡。

entries.sentence: I would like to have some almond jelly for dessert.
entries.translation: 我想吃杏仁凍當飯後甜點。

entries.sentence: We traveled to Paris by jet on my wife's birthday.
entries.translation: 我跟我太太在她生日那天一起搭噴射機到巴黎渡假。

entries.sentence: Phil went on a journey around Italy for ten days last year.
entries.translation: 菲爾去年到義大利旅行十天。

phrases.sentence: The couple made a journey across the Sahara on camels.
phrases.translation: 那對夫妻騎駱駝橫越撒哈拉沙漠旅行。

wordPlus.note: 以下名詞皆有「旅行；旅程」之意，惟語意用法略有不同：

items.chinese: 通常指搭乘陸上交通工具的長途旅行
通常表示乘船或到外太空的長途旅行
items.sentence: The ship set sail from Plymouth, England on a voyage to China.

items.chinese: 表示從某地到另一地的動作
items.sentence: Air travel is my favorite way to move between countries because it's quick and easy.

items.chinese: 通常表示兩地間的短程旅行，或是停留時間較短的旅行
items.sentence: Simon is planning a trip to Vietnam next month for his vacation.
All flights to Chicago today are canceled due to severe thunderstorms.

items.chinese: 通常表示參觀、遊覽，也可指巡迴表演
items.sentence: We joined a sightseeing tour of the city when we went to Vancouver.
Rita and Joe went on a cruise on the Mekong River during their honeymoon.
Alice led an expedition into a Malaysian rainforest for her scientific study.

entries.sentence: The steak was cooked to perfection as the meat was tender and juicy.
entries.translation: 這牛排烹調得很完美，肉又嫩又多汁。

entries.sentence: Joan is knitting a sweater for her son.
entries.translation: 瓊安正在為她兒子編織毛衣。

entries.sentence: Sarah is so busy these days that she sends her dirty clothes to the laundry.
entries.translation: 莎拉最近很忙，忙到得把髒衣服送洗。

entries.chinese: 待洗、已洗或送洗的衣物
entries.sentence: Eric does his laundry on Sundays as this is his only free day.
entries.translation: 週日是艾瑞克唯一有空的日子，所以他都在這天洗衣服。

entries.sentence: Leather products are made from the skins of animals.
entries.translation: 真皮商品由動物的皮製成。

wordPlus.note: 與「皮革」相關的常見名詞區分如下：

items.chinese: 皮革，指加工過的皮革製品
毛皮，指動物身上的毛皮
items.sentence: Some animals are hunted for their fur.

items.chinese: 毛髮，指動物或人身上的毛髮

entries.sentence: Lemonade provides rich amounts of vitamin C and helps to improve skin quality.
entries.translation: 檸檬水提供豐富的維他命C，有助於改善膚質。

entries.sentence: Caesar salad is a popular kind of salad that mixes lettuce with lemon juice dressing.
entries.translation: 凱撒沙拉是一種很受歡迎的沙拉，它把生菜和檸檬汁調醬混和在一起。

entries.sentence: Dogs show love toward their owners by licking their hands.
entries.translation: 狗舔主人的手以表示對主人的愛。

entries.sentence: Clothes made of linen are very suitable for wearing on hot summer days.
entries.translation: 亞麻布製成的衣服很適合在炎熱的夏天穿。

phrases.sentence: Jane broke up with Allen after she discovered he was always washing their dirty linen in public.
phrases.translation: 珍跟艾倫分手了，因為她發現艾倫總是在外宣揚他們之間不可告人的事。

entries.sentence: Drinking a lot of hard liquor can damage our health.
entries.translation: 喝太多烈酒會危害健康。

entries.sentence: In the bakery, many loaves of bread are being baked in the oven.
entries.translation: 在麵包店，許多麵包正在烤箱中烘烤。

entries.sentence: My mother doesn't want me to have lollipops or any other candy because they will damage my teeth.
entries.translation: 我媽不要我吃棒棒糖或其他糖果，因為這些東西會損壞我的牙齒。

entries.sentence: Supporters of the president will hold a march in Taipei next week.
entries.translation: 總統的支持者下週將在臺北舉行遊行。

entries.sentence: They marched into the office and demanded to see the manager.
entries.translation: 他們大步走進辦公室，要求見經理。

entries.sentence: I made a fruit salad with strawberries, mangoes, grapes, and two kinds of melon.
entries.translation: 我用草莓、芒果、葡萄和兩種甜瓜做了水果沙拉。

entries.sentence: Terry took his lunch out of the fridge and heated it up in the microwave.
entries.translation: 泰瑞從冰箱裡拿出午餐，放進微波爐加熱。

entries.sentence: Esther microwaved the cold pizza for one minute so that she could eat it hot.
entries.translation: 艾絲特把冷掉的披薩微波了一分鐘，這樣她才能吃到熱披薩。

entries.sentence: Not all mushrooms are edible, so never pick and eat them in the forest.
entries.translation: 並非所有的蕈類皆可食用，所以不要在森林裡採食它們。

entries.sentence: The city is quickly developing with new buildings mushrooming everywhere.
entries.translation: 隨著新的建築物如雨後春筍般出現在各處，這城市正迅速發展中。

entries.sentence: In Taiwan, young students are required to take a nap after lunch.
entries.translation: 在臺灣，中小學生依規定要午餐後要午休。

entries.sentence: Tom stayed up dancing late last night, so he was very tired and napped at work this morning.
entries.translation: 湯姆昨晚熬夜跳舞，所以今天早上他很累，上班時還打盹。

entries.sentence: Hank wore a blue necktie to go with his suit.
entries.translation: 漢克打了一條藍色領帶搭配他的西裝。
